item.author: devmanas13

item.title: tsParticles - 光标彩虹形状轨迹 | tsParticles - Cursor Rainbow Shapes Trail
item.description:
发表于 1 月 28 日

现在轮到你了！ 创建一个帐户，加入数十万 DEV 成员的旅程。

一旦暂停，saefalhakime 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，saefalhakime 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，saefalhakime 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 saefalhakime 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 saefalhakime：

降低 saefalhakime 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 saefalhakime 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

SᗩIᖴ KᕼᗩᒪEᗪ𖤓

Posted on Jan 28

tsParticles - Cursor Rainbow Shapes Trail

Now it's your turn! 🗒 Share a tutorial🤔 Reflect on your coding journey

❓ Ask a question

Create an account to join hundreds of thousands of DEV members on their journey.

Vincent Durand (Wyllen) - Dec 23 '22

Amiru Weerathunga - Jan 6

Once suspended, saefalhakime will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, saefalhakime will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by saefalhakime will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If saefalhakime is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag saefalhakime:

Make all posts by saefalhakime less visible

saefalhakime consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging saefalhakime will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: saefalhakime
